easy.title: Build Card with Only Utility Classes
easy.description: Build a card component using only utility classes — no custom CSS. The card should have an image placeholder, a title, a description paragraph, and a call-to-action button. Use classes for spacing, background, rounded corners, shadow, and typography.

medium.title: Build Responsive Layout with Utilities Only
medium.description: Create a responsive dashboard layout using only utility classes. The layout must include a sidebar, a header, and a main content area. On mobile the sidebar should collapse to the top, on desktop it should sit on the left. Use flex and responsive prefix utilities only — no media queries in CSS.

hard.title: Create a Mini Utility-First CSS Framework
hard.description: Build a small utility-first CSS framework from scratch. Include a spacing scale (p-, m- from 0 to 8 based on 4px units), a flex utility set, a grid utility set, typography utilities (text-xs through text-4xl), and basic color utilities (text-* and bg-*). Organize into partial files and include responsive prefix variants (md:).
